import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn second_token(_ s: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n + 1
    end
  end
  mut start1 = i - 1
  if start1 < 0
    return None
  end
  mut j = start1
  while j < n
    match string.byte_at(s, j)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        j = n + 1
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    when None
      j = n + 1
    end
  end
  mut k = j - 1
  if k > n
    k = n
  end
  if k >= n
    return None
  end
  while k < n
    match string.byte_at(s, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        k = k + 1
      else
        k = n + 1
      end
    when None
      k = n + 1
    end
  end
  mut start2 = k - 1
  if start2 > n
    return None
  end
  if start2 >= n
    return None
  end
  mut m = start2
  while m < n
    match string.byte_at(s, m)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        m = n + 1
      else
        m = m + 1
      end
    when None
      m = n + 1
    end
  end
  let stop2 = m - 1
  if stop2 > n
    let real_stop = n
    Some(string.substring(s, start2, real_stop))
  else
    Some(string.substring(s, start2, stop2))
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        match second_token(line)
        when Some(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(n)
            total = total + n
          when None
            total = total
          end
        when None
          total = total
        end
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
